titleStmt.title: SII 28.180: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 180. (A.R. No. 335 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, east gōpuram, right of entrance

Records the gift of 300 poṉ, realisable through the levies koṟṟu and ilakkai due to the government (irāi-karattukku padiṉda) for preparation of 20 meals (taḷikai) daily, to be offered to God Chidamparēśvaraṉ and subsequently to be distributed to the mendicants (tiruvōṭṭu-nāyamār) (See 184 below)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ śubhamastu . svasti . śrīveṅkaṭa teva mahārāyar pṛdhivi rājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa
śakābdam 1000 5 100 10ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa caṟuvatāri varuṣam mārkaḻi mātam 22 nāḷ vaiyappa
[kṛṣṇappak] koṇṭama nāyakkar cuvāmi citampareśvaraṉukku Irupatu taḷikai naivvettiyam
kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu Intappiṟacātam tiruvoṭṭu nāyamāṟku pikṣaiyiṭak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭikku
kumutappaṭaiyil cilāsātaṉam paṇṇiṉapaṭi muṉṉāḷ tirukkoyilil Irācakara
ttukku patiṉta koṟṟu Ilakkai muṉṉūṟu poṉṉum citampareśvaraṉukku caṟuva māṉiyamāka
tārai vāttukkuṭuttu Intap poṉṉukku tiṉam Oṉṟukku cuvāmiyāṟku Irupatu taḷikai ko
yil paṇṭārattile naivettiyam paṇṇi yinta Irupatu taḷikaiyu tiruvoṭṭu nāyamā
ṟku tiṉam pikṣaiyiṭak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭiyāle Intappaṭi Irupatu taḷikaiyu naivettiyam
paṇṇi pikṣai naṭattivarak kaṭavarākavum Intap puṇṇiyam yātoruvar paripālaṉam paṇṇi
ṉa per sahastra Iliṅkap piṟatiṭṭaipaṇṇiṉa puṇṇiyam Aṉupavikkak kaṭavarākavum Intat ta
ṉmattukku yātāmoruvaṉ Akitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ keṅkaikkaraiyile kārām pacuvaik koṉ
ṟu mātorukevaṉam mātṛgamanam paṇṇiṉa toṣattile pokakkaṭavaṉṉākavum § §
Digital edition of SII 28.180 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
